description: Keyword-recall probes for papers/ corpus acceptance (make_knowledge vs raw ingest)

queries.query: How do language models transcribe or translate endangered languages?
What are voice agents and how do AI systems handle spoken conversation?
How does finetuning affect LLM behavior on false or negated claims?
How do frontier LLMs act as agents selecting actions from context?
What is agentic evolution for improving programs and workflows?
How are natural-language software requirements validated for safety?
How does retrieval augmented generation improve search over documents?
How do dense embeddings support semantic search over a corpus?
